overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a rural dirt road during a dramatic weather transition from a thunderstorm to sunny skies. The character crosses railroad tracks and encounters a horse rider before entering a wooded area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie dirt road during thunderstorm

events.description: lightning strikes in the distance behind the character
rain begins to lighten and storm clouds start to dissipate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy dirt road away from the storm

entered.detail: muddy dirt path with wagon wheel ruts running through grassland
parallel train tracks running alongside the road into the distance
wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires
tall evergreen tree silhouetted against the storm clouds
mountain range partially obscured by dark storm clouds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy prairie landscape with dark clouds and visible lightning. The character walks along a muddy dirt road parallel to railroad tracks, passing telephone poles and scattered trees as rain falls heavily.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit grassland with scattered trees and fences

events.description: sunlight breaks through clouds illuminating the landscape with warm light
weather fully clears revealing blue sky and fluffy white clouds

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the storm clears and visibility improves dramatically

entered.detail: simple wooden post fence running along the left side of the road
white painted wooden signpost at a trail intersection

segments.scene_description: As the storm clears, sunlight illuminates the prairie revealing wooden fences and signposts along the road. The telephone poles recede into the distance as the character approaches a junction, with rocky mesas becoming visible on the horizon.

events.description: sun becomes clearly visible in the sky creating lens flare effects

agents.ego_description: walking through sunlit grasslands approaching a railroad crossing

entered.detail: gravel and rock bed of the railroad crossing ahead

segments.scene_description: The landscape brightens significantly as the sun emerges, casting strong shadows across the dirt road. The character approaches a railroad crossing with gravel beds visible, while telephone poles line the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: railroad crossing and forest edge trail

events.description: character crosses the railroad tracks moving from left to right
rider on horseback passes from right to left crossing the path ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the railroad tracks and continuing into the wooded trail

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse galloping across the path from right to left

entered.detail: thick cluster of deciduous trees forming the forest edge
thick cluster of deciduous trees forming the forest edge

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the railroad tracks as a horse rider gallops past in the opposite direction. Entering a wooded area, the scene becomes dappled with shade from dense forest canopy overhead, while the railroad tracks fall away to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a stormy prairie that gradually transforms into a bright, sun-drenched woodland. It begins on a muddy dirt road under dark clouds and heavy rain, with lightning flashing across a landscape of railroad tracks and telephone poles. As the storm clears, the lighting shifts from gray to brilliant gold, revealing wooden fences and distant rocky mesas as the camera approaches a road junction. The scene then brightens significantly, casting strong shadows across the gravel of a railroad crossing before the character passes a galloping horse rider. Finally, the open prairie gives way to a dense forest, where the sunlight becomes dappled under a thick canopy of trees as the tracks recede into the distance.
